MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-11-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Citibank South Dakota, N.A.
Defendant Travis W. Delrio was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed January 23, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, May 11, 2009.

Terms of the agreement of the parties were placed on the record by Ms. McDonald. In accordance with the stipulation for entry of judgment, defendant Travis W. Delrio shall pay the sum of $2,230.00 to plaintiff Citibank South Dakota, N.A. as follows: $500.00 is due on June 11, 2009. Thereafter, defendant Travis W. Delrio shall plaintiff Citibank South Dakota, N.A. the sum of $100.00 each month until the balance is paid in full. Defendant's monthly payments shall be due on the 15th of each month. Defendant shall sign and return the stipulation for entry of judgment to plaintiff, along with the initial payment of $500.00, no later than June 11, 2009.

If defendant Travis W. Delrio fails to make any of the afore-mentioned payments, he (defendant) shall have 10 days to cure the default. If defendant Travis W. Delrio fails to cure the default, plaintiff Citibank South Dakota, N.A. may obtain judgment in the amount of $3,051.07, with interest calculated at 10% per annum.

Defendant was voir dired by the Court as to the terms and his understanding of this agreement. Terms of this agreement shall be reduced to writing by Ms. McDonald.

Matter is continued to June 15, 2009 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 206 for hearing re: Settlement Protective Date.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2009 Set For Trial On May-11-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
